name: perler-beads
description: 七卡瓦拼豆底稿生成器 - 让你轻松制作精美的像素画作品

scripts.electron:dev: concurrently -k "next dev" "wait-on http://localhost:3000 && npm run electron:compile && cross-env NODE_ENV=development electron ."
scripts.electron:build: cross-env ELECTRON_BUILD=true next build && npm run electron:compile && electron-builder --win --config electron/electron-builder.yml
scripts.electron:build:dir: cross-env ELECTRON_BUILD=true next build && npm run electron:compile && electron-builder --win --dir --config electron/electron-builder.yml
scripts.electron:build:all: cross-env ELECTRON_BUILD=true next build && npm run electron:compile && electron-builder --win --mac --linux --config electron/electron-builder.yml
